title: Review Comment
description: Anchored review comment produced by the Working Paper Review Engine.

comment_id.description: Stable identifier for the comment within a run.

source_run_id.description: Identifier linking the comment to a review run manifest.

reviewer_persona_id.description: Identifier of the persona that produced the comment.

section_id.description: Document section or element identifier derived from the structured map.

page_reference.description: Human-readable page/paragraph/figure reference, e.g., 'p.7 para 3' or element locator.

anchor_text.description: Exact text snippet or description of the anchored element the comment references.

comment_text.description: Primary comment content describing the issue.

rationale.description: Reasoning that ties the comment to the anchor and persona concerns.

suggested_revision.description: Actionable guidance to address the issue.

confidence.description: Model or reviewer confidence score between 0 and 1.

deduplication_key.description: Optional normalized key to aid duplicate detection.

metadata.description: Optional additional context (e.g., model version, prompt template).
